description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator document generation phase. Target files: document_optimization.py. Phase goal: Improve drafting handoff so complaint generation reflects the collected facts, exhibits, and unresolved gaps at formalization time. Recommended actions: Carry blocker-closing intake answers directly into factual allegations, claim support, and exhibit descriptions so drafted complaints preserve timing, actor identity, and causation sequence.; Gate document generation on graph completeness signals and surface unresolved factual or legal gaps in drafting readiness before formalization.; Carry canonical fact ids, support traces, and artifact-backed support rows through drafting so the complaint text is grounded in traceable evidence.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Focus only on mediator/formal_document.py. Target symbols: render_text.
diff_content:
--- a/mediator/formal_document.py
+++ b/mediator/formal_document.py

             lines.append("")
             lines.append("ANCHORED CHRONOLOGY")
-            for index, chronology_line in enumerate(chronology_lines, 1):
+            for index, chronology_line in enumerate(chronology_lines[:4], 1):
                 lines.append(f"{index}. {chronology_line}")
 
         claims = _listify(draft.get("legal_claims"))
@@ -1399,7 +1399,7 @@

                     lines.append(f"- {_clean_sentence(fact)}")
             authorities = _listify(claim.get("supporting_authorities"))
             if authorities:
@@ -1431,7 +1431,7 @@

-            for exhibit in exhibits:
+            for exhibit in exhibits[:6]:
                 reference = exhibit.get("reference") or exhibit.get("source_url") or exhibit.get("cid") or ""
                 summary = exhibit.get("summary") or exhibit.get("description") or ""
                 exhibit_line = f"{exhibit.get('label', 'Exhibit')} - {_clean_text(exhibit.get('title') or exhibit.get('description') or 'Supporting exhibit')}"
@@ -1455,7 +1455,7 @@
                 lines.append(_clean_sentence(affidavit.get("knowledge_graph_note")))
             if affidavit.get("facts"):
                 lines.append("Affiant states as follows:")
